note: V13 Beacon Phase II-B advisory-only ships. Adds 3-of-5 threshold sigs, revocation, and mirror_url metadata to the existing II-A schema. ZERO consensus / block-validation / mining impact (link-time invariant test 14). (A) include/sost/beacon.h: Notice extended with threshold/signatures_b64/revokes/mirror_url; BEACON_THRESHOLD_REQUIRED=3, BEACON_THRESHOLD_KEY_COUNT=5, BEACON_THRESHOLD_PUBKEYS[5] extern; ThresholdVerifyResult + verify_threshold_signatures() declared. (B) src/beacon.cpp: 5 placeholder threshold pubkeys (fail-closed by construction); parser accepts new optional fields; canonical_payload emits II-B fields ONLY when any II-B field is set (preserves II-A byte stability); verify_threshold_signatures() dedups by signer index (same key cannot count twice, replayed signature counts once); is_active branches on threshold > 0 (threshold path) vs == 0 (legacy II-A); load_active_notices does 3-pass: validate -> collect threshold-signed revocations -> drop revoked ids (single-sig notices have NO revocation power); serialize_notices_for_rpc exposes threshold/revokes/mirror_url. mirror_url is metadata only: no socket, no DNS, no fetch. (C) tests/test_v13_beacon_phase2b.cpp NEW: 14 functions / 33 asserts / 33 PASS covering threshold pass/fail, dedup, unknown signer, malformed sig, empty sigs, threshold>M, II-A backwards compat end-to-end, II-A cannot revoke, expired II-B ignored, mirror_url metadata, canonical II-A vs II-B differ + II-A stable, tampered threshold detected, link-time no consensus dependency. (D) docs/V13_BEACON_PHASE_II_B.md NEW (174 lines): full schema, canonical layout, verification + revocation algorithms, operator key requirements (5 keys generated offline at release ceremony), risk register. Phase III P2P remains DORMANT (BEACON_P2P_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = INT64_MAX). Phase II-A existing test unchanged + still PASS. Activation gate: BEACON_PHASE2A_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = V13_HEIGHT = 12000 (shared with II-A; II-B is a schema extension, not a new gate).
